_comment: Cave World (洞府界) — the vast sealed artificial world created by the Seven-Colored Daoist. Contains Planet Suzaku and other cultivation planets. Canon: an enclosed realm with a visible sky barrier (the seal). The space between planets is a void of spiritual energy. This dimension represents that inter-planetary void — the player sees distant planet surfaces floating in spiritual fog. Biomes: (1) cave_world_void — the default void between planets, dark fog, no ground, only floating platforms of spiritual energy and occasional soul fragments from dead cultivators; (2) sealed_barrier_zone — the edge where the Realm-Sealing Grand Array manifests as visible energy barriers (bright, dangerous); (3) spiritual_energy_sea — regions of pure condensed spiritual energy forming a luminous sea that cultivators can absorb from. Uses the_end noise settings (floating islands pattern) because Cave World space is fragmented — it is NOT a continuous surface like a planet. Prime Directive: the Cave World exists objectively — the Seven-Colored Daoist created it, regardless of player knowledge. The seal is real. Breaking it changes ownership, not existence.
